name: Chicken Salad Appetizer
directions: In bowl combine chicken, chopped celery, almonds, and onion.  Mix well.
Add mayonnaise, curry powder and lemon juice.  Mix well.
Cover mixture with plastic wrap and chill for 1 hour.
Serve.

name: Spicy Beef Spread
directions: In a medium bowl, beat cream cheese and mayonnaise until smooth.
Stir in onions, mustard, horseradish and garlic salt.
Finely chop corned beef or pastrami.
Stir into cream cheese mixture and chill until firm.
Serve with thinly sliced party rye bread.

name: Chicken Enchilada Salad
directions: Mix the first 9 ingredients.
Spread on cracker and sprinkle with cheese.

name: Jalapeno Chicken Spread
directions: Finely chop chicken with a knife or in a food processor.
Heat oil in a 12-inch skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook until tender and golden on all sides, stirring frequently.
Combine cream cheese, mayonnaise, milk, red pepper, jalapeño, lemon juice, salt, Tabasco sauce and cooked chicken in a bowl and mix until well blended.
Preheat oven to 375°F.
Spoon chicken mixture into an oven-safe crock or small casserole.
Bake 20 minutes or until mixture is hot and bubbly.
Serve with crisp crackers or pita triangles.

name: Braunschweiger Spread
directions: Combine first 7 ingredients; mix well.
Pat mixture in a bowl lined with plastic wrap.  Cover and chill.
Unmold and put round part up on a serving platter and sprinkle with parsley.
Serve with pumpernickel bread party slices.

name: Braunschweiger Ball
directions: Mix braunschweiger,Worcestershire sauce,catsup,and onion in the bowl of a food processor until well blended.
Wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate until firm enough to shape into a ball. (overnight in the refrigerator or 2-3 hours in the freezer).
Shape mixture into a ball, spread with the cream cheese, and roll in either chopped parsley or pecans.
Serve with your favorite crackers. (Triscuit deli-rye are really good with this!).

name: Hot Bacon Spread
directions: Preheat oven to 375°F.
Cook bacon until crisp; drain and crumble bacon.
Blend cream cheese with milk. Stir in onion, horseradish and crumbled bacon.
Spread in an individual casserole or small oven-proof platter. Bake 15 minutes.
Serve with cracker or fresh vegetables.

similar.name: Melt in the Mouth Chicken Liver Pate

name: Melt in the Mouth Chicken Liver Pate
directions: Melt 20g butter in a large heavy-based pan , add  onions and brown sugar, cover pan and sweat  over a  low heat for 5 minutes.
Uncover pan, stir onions and cook on a medium heat for 10 minutes or until they are soft and starting to colour.
Add another 100g of butter to the pan and allow it to melt.
Add chicken livers, garlic and thyme leaves and continue to cook on a medium heat, stirring every so often to ensure the mixture doesn't "catch" (stick or burn) until livers are no longer pink.
Transfer mixture to a food processor and leave to cool.
Add lemon juice to pan to deglaze and add to pate mixture.
Add remaining butter, cream, salt and pepper to the mixture and process until smooth.
Check seasoning and adjust as necessary.

If you like this consistency then all you need do is spoon the pate into a serving dish, cover with clingfilm and chill for at least 3 hours.  However I pass the pate through a fine metal mesh sieve before chilling it.
Serve with hot wholemeal toast, warm soda bread or crostini.

name: Hawaiian Chicken Salad
directions: Drain meat well and blot on paper towels to dry meat and drain pineapple well.  Bring cream cheese to room temperature to soften and chop celery and onion, med to fine.  Mix meat, pineapple, celery, onion and cream cheese in large bowl,mix well with fork.  Season to taste with salt and pepper. Cover and chill several hours or overnite is better. To serve cut the center out of the bread and stuff with salad.  Chop the center bread that was removed into cubes. Garnish with coconut or pecans.(I prefer pecans)serve on party crackers and bread cubes.

name: Easy Liver Pate
directions: soften cream cheese and liverwurst.
add other ingredients, mix well with fork. chill before serving.

similar.name: Melt in the Mouth Chicken Liver Pate

name: Smoky Chicken Spread
directions: In a large bowl, combine the first 8 ingredients.
Cover and chill at least 2 hours.
Serve with crackers.

name: Chicken Salad Bake
directions: Saute' celery and onion in butter until soft.  In 2 qt casserole, mix sauteed mixture with mayo, milk, lemon juice, wine, salt, stir well.
Add chicken, chestnuts and cheese.  Sprinkle almonds over top.
Let stand in refrigerator overnight.  Bake at 425 degrees for 30 minutes.  Stir once or twice during baking.
